---
title: "Ski Safe Runs Update"
output: pdf_document
--------------------

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(here)
```

## Locate newest run file

```{r}
# Find all matching files in project root
files <- list.files(
  path = here(),
  pattern = "SkiSafe Run .*\\.csv",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# Pick the most recently modified file
latest_file <- files[which.max(file.info(files)$mtime)]

latest_file
```

## Latest file detected

```{r}
cat("Latest file:", latest_file, "\n")
```

## Load and update master dataset

```{r}
# Read data
new_run <- read_csv(latest_file)
master_path <- here("data", "Ski_Safe_Runs.csv")
master <- read_csv(master_path)

# Append and deduplicate
updated_master <- bind_rows(master, new_run) %>% distinct()
```

## Save updated dataset

```{r}
write_csv(updated_master, master_path)
```

## Summary

```{r}
tibble(
  rows_before = nrow(master),
  rows_added = nrow(updated_master) - nrow(master),
  rows_after = nrow(updated_master),
  file_used = latest_file
)
```
